scenarios.name: Policy overlay affects runtime behavior
assertions: Different overlays change runtime behavior in observable ways.

scenarios.name: OpenClaw remains Layer 2 owner
assertions: Cortex augments assembly without replacing session mechanics.

scenarios.name: Startup bundle is bounded
assertions: The startup bundle fits a bounded assembly model.
Knowledge is pointer-driven rather than injected wholesale.

non_goals: Replacing OpenClaw compaction in the first pass
